query:
INSERT OR REPLACE INTO instance_links (
            instance_id,
            link_kind,
            modrinth_project_id,
            modrinth_version_id,
            server_project_id,
            content_project_id,
            content_version_id,
            hosting_server_id,
            hosting_instance_ids,
            hosting_active_instance_id,
            shared_instance_id
        )
        VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, jsonb(?), ?, ?)
